ddls:
CREATE TABLE "majors" (
  "major_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major */,
  "major_name" TEXT /* Name of the major (e.g., Agriculture, Psychology) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the major */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the major belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_majors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "institution_type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., university, college) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "major_institution" (
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_id", "institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment_statistics" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the enrollment data */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major associated with the enrollment */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution associated with the enrollment */,
  "enrollment_count" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled in the major */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_statistics_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_statistics_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graduation_statistics" (
  "graduation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graduation record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the graduation data */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major associated with the graduation rate */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution associated with the graduation rate */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Percentage of students graduating from the major */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graduation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graduation_statistics_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graduation_statistics_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "placement_statistics" (
  "placement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each placement record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the placement data */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major associated with the placement rate */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution associated with the placement rate */,
  "placement_rate" REAL /* Percentage of graduates placed in jobs related to their major */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("placement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_placement_statistics_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_placement_statistics_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major for which the report is generated */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tool */,
  "tool_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the tool */,
  "tool_url" TEXT /* URL for the tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view report, generate report) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tool used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES analysis_tools ("tool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "majors_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major related to the trend */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution related to the trend */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend data */,
  "enrollment_rate" REAL /* Enrollment rate for the major */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate for the major */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., enrollment, graduation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_majors_trends_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_majors_trends_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data record */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major related to the data */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution related to the data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data record */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., enrollment, graduation) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)
